items.title: Save $70 on this 24V Greenworks cordless electric 8-inch pole saw + 20-inch pole hedge trimmer combo kit at $170
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Greenworks 24V Cordless Electric 8-inch Pole Saw and 20-inch Pole Hedge Trimmer Combo kit at $169.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing from the brand’s direct website. Dropping down from $240 here, we saw this same rate appear at the top of 2026 while other discounts this year have only gone as low as $184. While we have seen it go a bit lower in the past, the deal here gives you a solid 29% markdown that cuts $70 off the tag for the best price we have tracked since October. You can also find a large number of additional Greenworks tools and equipment with discounts in the brand’s official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Lenovo’s Legion Tab Gen 3 Android tablet hits one of its lowest prices at $170 off just ahead of the Gen 5 release
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Lenovo that drops its Legion Tab Gen 3 Android tablet down to $379.99 shipped. Just be sure to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE at checkout to unlock the discount. This tablet originally debuted at $500 last year before eventually climbing to the $550 mark, so today’s offer delivers a solid chunk of savings with a $170 discount to bring it back down to near–Black Friday pricing. It’s also worth noting that this pricing arrives just in time ahead of its highly anticipated successor, the Legion Tab (Gen 5), which is hitting the shelves at $849. That makes the current Gen 3 model a particularly compelling pick right now if you’re looking to score a capable Android tablet for gaming or everyday use without emptying your wallet.

After last week’s unveiling of six new LEGO One Piece sets, the LEGO Group is back this week, revealing its newest Star Wars themed set from The Mandalorian that will also have a dedicated GWP joining it during the initial launch, coinciding with the annual May the 4th event, which will also have an additional GWP, too. What’s more, this new build is coming as the first UCS set of 2026, likely making it the centerpiece for LEGO’s upcoming Star Wars event next month. We’ve gathered up all the information on this new build below and the two GWPs, alongside plenty of pictures, so head down to check it out ahead of its upcoming release.
